question: Is customer data encrypted at rest?
Is customer data encrypted in transit?
Do you support customer-managed encryption keys (CMEK/BYOK)?
Is multi-factor authentication enforced for all employee access?
Do you support single sign-on (SAML/OIDC) for customer accounts?
Do you have a current SOC 2 Type 2 report?
Are you PCI DSS compliant, and what is the scope?
What are your data classification levels?
Is customer data used to train your base models?
Will you sign a HIPAA Business Associate Agreement (BAA)?
Are security events centrally logged and monitored 24/7?
Do you operate a public bug bounty program?
Were all findings from your most recent penetration test remediated?
Is access for terminated employees always removed within one business day?
